title: Platform & Infrastructure Engineer
headline: Made fast-moving engineering workflows safer and clearer.
summary: Built CI/CD tooling, deployment automation, secret workflows, Kubernetes/GCP infrastructure, and oncall-bot, an AI-assisted incident workflow that helped resolve 40 infrastructure issues in one week.
bullets: Built and maintained internal CI/CD tooling for large TypeScript and .NET monorepos.
Improved CircleCI, WCI, Dagger, and GitHub based workflows so developers got faster and clearer feedback.
Created deployment automation for backend, web, and internal services.
Migrated secret management workflows to GCP Secret Manager, External Secrets, and internal tooling.
Built oncall-bot, an AI-assisted incident workflow for root-cause analysis and remediation that helped resolve 40 separate infrastructure issues in one week through focused PRs.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer
headline: Created reusable AWS infrastructure and CI/CD patterns.
summary: Helped move infrastructure from a cowboy-style setup toward Terraform-backed standards and self-service delivery workflows.
bullets: Created AWS infrastructure through Terraform.
Created modular CI/CD pipelines to enable developers to ship their own Terraform.
Created reusable modules to express company standards.

title: Platform Engineering Architect
headline: Reframed DevOps as platform engineering.
summary: Stabilized inherited systems, architected EKS migration, onboarded ArgoCD, and developed Cue-based configuration management.
bullets: Took over the DevOps team and rebranded it to Platform Engineering.
Stabilized old Kubernetes cluster and architected migration to EKS.
Onboarded ArgoCD and developed Cue-based configuration management.
Participated in on-call rotation for production systems.

title: CTO / Co-Founder
headline: Built a bootstrapped product platform from the ground up.
summary: Owned product and technology choices across frontend, backend, local development, Kubernetes delivery, and onboarding workflows.
bullets: Developed frontend and backend applications.
Implemented Nix/direnv based tooling for fast, stable onboarding on Mac and Linux.
Implemented Tilt and Kubernetes workflows for local development.

title: Sr. Software Developer
headline: Made local development and delivery safer.
summary: Led migration work across Kubernetes, Python 3, typed Python, CI/CD, branch deploys, and integration instrumentation.
bullets: Led technical debt remediation including Kubernetes migration, Python 2.7 to 3.9 upgrade, Python typing, and restored tests.
Managed CI/CD with Bitbucket Pipelines, QA auto-deploys, migrations, tests, and branch deploys.
Instrumented a large-scale integration framework and fixed long-standing production issues.

title: Software Engineer
headline: Built the developer platforms behind large-scale local environments.
summary: Designed Kubernetes-backed developer environments, platform CLIs, logging infrastructure, certificate automation, registry caching, and tools that helped teams create and operate service stacks.
bullets: Designed and built Kubernetes-backed developer environments and platform tooling for service stacks.
Built CLI and GUI tooling for creating, destroying, tunneling into, and operating leased development environments.
Built logging infrastructure, certificate automation, registry caching, and Kubernetes authentication bridge work.

title: Developer of Awesome
headline: Automated physical SIP-phone testing.
summary: Built systems that checked out real phones, drove calls, converted text to speech and speech back to text, and prevented deadlocks in automated tests.
bullets: Built WebSocket implementation of a custom TCP messaging transport called JiveWire.
Built phone automation using Raspberry Pi boards connected to SIP phones.
Built a checkout system to prevent deadlocks in automated phone tests.

title: Lead Automation Engineer
headline: Turned repeated manual QA into automated systems.
summary: Built automated tests, reporting systems, distributed test runners, HL7 end-to-end test frameworks, database integration tests, and service harnesses.
bullets: Built automated tests, testing frameworks, and reporting systems.
Built end-to-end HL7 testing framework for previously manual workflows.
Built database integration tests for a migration from MSSQL to PostgreSQL.
